# anthropic_workspace_rate_limits (Data Source)

Lists rate-limit OVERRIDES configured on a workspace. Groups inherited from the organization are NOT returned — absence of a group means inherit, not no-limit.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_workspace_rate_limits" "platform" {
  workspace_id = "wrkspc_01JwQvzr7rXLA5AGx3HKfFUJ"
}

# Optional filter — only overrides for the token_count group.
data "anthropic_workspace_rate_limits" "platform_tokens" {
  workspace_id = "wrkspc_01JwQvzr7rXLA5AGx3HKfFUJ"
  group_type   = "token_count"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String)

### Optional

- `group_type` (String) Optional filter: model_group, batch, token_count, files, skills, web_search.

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `group_type` (String)
- `limits` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups--limits))
- `models` (List of String)

<a id="nestedatt--groups--limits"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups.limits`

Read-Only:

- `org_limit` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `value` (Number)
